name: FinOps MCP - Azure Advisor Remediation

parameters.name: jsonBody
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ method: 'tools/call', params: { name: 'finops_get_savings_recommendations', arguments: { provider: 'azure', min_savings_usd: 50, limit: 20, response_format: 'json' } } }) }}

parameters.name: jsonBody
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ method: 'tools/call', params: { name: 'finops_apply_remediation', arguments: { recommendation_id: $json.id, action_type: $json.category === 'rightsizing' ? 'rightsize' : ($json.category === 'idle_resources' ? 'stop_idle' : 'rightsize'), resource_id: $json.resource_id, provider: 'azure', executed_by: 'n8n_workflow', estimated_savings_usd: $json.estimated_savings_usd, notes: 'Auto-logged by n8n FinOps scheduler. Pending human approval.' } } }) }}

_comment: Internal cluster URL used: http://finops-optimizer-mcp.moizaleem21-dev.svc.cluster.local:8080/mcp — works when n8n is also on OpenShift. If n8n is external, use the Route URL instead.
